query:
SELECT COALESCE(jc.status::text, 'running') as "status!"
           FROM (
               SELECT DISTINCT ON (trigger, runnable_path) id
               FROM v2_job
               WHERE workspace_id = $1
                 AND trigger_kind = 'ci_test'
                 AND created_at > now() - make_interval(secs => $2)
               ORDER BY trigger, runnable_path, created_at DESC
           ) latest
           LEFT JOIN v2_job_completed jc ON jc.id = latest.id
